response:
• At approximately 2:45 PM on March 15, a silver 2019 Honda Accord traveling eastbound on Oak Street failed to stop at a red light and collided with a white 2021 Ford F-150 proceeding northbound through the intersection of Maple Avenue, causing the pickup truck to spin 90 degrees and strike a nearby traffic signal pole.

• Emergency medical services responded to the scene and transported the driver of the Honda, a 34-year-old male, to County General Hospital with suspected moderate injuries, while the driver of the Ford declined medical treatment; both vehicles sustained significant front-end damage and were towed from the scene by approved vendors.

• Preliminary investigation indicates that distracted driving and wet road conditions from light rain were contributing factors; the Honda driver was issued a citation for failure to obey a traffic control device, and witness statements from two bystanders have been documented for the ongoing insurance and claims review process.
